flashcards.front: What is the primary function of a MAC protocol?
flashcards.back: To manage access to a shared communication medium

flashcards.front: Which MAC protocol is used in Ethernet networks?
What is the main advantage of controlled access protocols?
What is the main disadvantage of random access protocols?
What is the purpose of framing in MAC protocols?
flashcards.back: To add headers and trailers to the data
